ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_location" TEXT /* Location where the race is held */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., regatta, championship) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Specific start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Specific end time of the race */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Distance of the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the race */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "sailno" TEXT /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the boat */,
  "club" TEXT /* Club representing the boat */,
  "hcap" REAL /* Handicap rating of the boat */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the boat class */,
  "boat_length" REAL /* Length of the boat */,
  "boat_type" TEXT /* Type of the boat (e.g., sail, motor) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the boat was built */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the boat was registered with the club */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES race_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_club FOREIGN KEY ("club") REFERENCES clubs ("club_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race associated with the result */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the boat that achieved this result */,
  "finish" INTEGER /* Finish position of the boat */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time taken (HH:MM:SS) */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time accounting for handicap (HH:MM:SS) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded based on finish position */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Specific start time for the boat in the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Specific finish time for the boat in the race */,
  "penalties" REAL /* Any penalties applied to the boat */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* Final position after applying penalties */,
  "points_awarded" INTEGER /* Points awarded based on the final position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the club */,
  "club_website" TEXT /* Website of the club */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the club */,
  "club_logo" TEXT /* URL to the club's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, participant) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., race reminder, schedule update) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class of boats */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., Monohull, Multihull) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "min_length" REAL /* Minimum length of boats in the class */,
  "max_length" REAL /* Maximum length of boats in the class */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight of boats in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)
